prompt: A dreamy fashion editorial portrait of a young woman standing outdoors on a rainy, overcast day beside a shallow reflecting pool and a pebled stone walkway, shown from about mid-thigh up in a vertical composition. She wears a monochrome pale powder-blue rain outfit consisting of a wide-brim waterproof sun hat and a high-collared technical raincoat with a hood, shiny silver front zippers, multiple drawstrings, toggles, and cord details around the waist and chest. The coat is zipped high so the collar covers part of the lower face, giving a cocooned, utilitarian look. Her short dark bob hair peeks out from under the hat. Pose her turned slightly to the side, body angled right, head facing the camera, with a calm, quiet, introspective mood. Use soft diffused light, muted cool tones, misty atmosphere, and very shallow depth of field so the modern architectural structures in the background are blurred and minimal. The setting should feel futuristic and serene, with wet surfaces, faint raindrops, pale gray sky, gentle reflections in the water, and a clean minimalist color palette dominated by pale powder blue. Make the image look like high-end contemporary streetwear photography, slightly cinematic, airy, soft focus, delicate contrast, and subtle film-like texture. Add a small handwritten-style watermark reading aichof near the right-center edge.
